# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v3
      with:
        java-version: '11'

    - name: Build application
      run: ./gradlew build

    - name: Archive build output
      run: |
        mkdir -p artifacts
        cp -R build/libs/*.jar artifacts/
        cp -R config/ artifacts/
        cp -R scripts/ artifacts/

    - name: Upload artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: artifacts/

    - name: Notify team about build completion
      run: echo "Build and artifacts are available for download."

  download:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
    - name: Download artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: ./downloaded-artifacts

    - name: Confirm artifact availability
      run: echo "Artifacts have been successfully downloaded for distribution."
